title: Cartoon Dweller
description: NEW Unique Dwelller with cartoonish animations, custom model and sounds...
body:
The Cartoon Dweller is scarier version of original Cartoon Cat. He has custom, non-boring sounds. He can speak english. Model is based on Addon called ,,Trevor Henderson Addon By FunTime_Lefty". Animations are unique. Thanks to Rupter for making them. For now, some animations are big glitchy. Hitbow are glitchy too, but i'll fix that in new update. You can find this Dweller in caves. He doesn't have his own ID for now. 
## **Have a good time playing with this dweller!**
### **_This mod requires GeckoLib installed!_**
